transcript.text: So basically you wanted to walk through of the website how you can edit content, correct?
Have you used any WordPress before?
Yeah, I haven't specifically used Webflow, but our team has, yeah.
I have shared with the invitation to, uh,
So once you accept the invitation, you might have received one email on your email address.
So you basically need to go to this website.
So first of all, you go to HockeyStack website.
And you will simply type question mark added at the end of the URL, question mark added.
And once you add the question mark added and click on enter, you will now enter the admin panel of this website.
So there will be a bar which you can see will come up at the bottom.
Like it's a bit slow, but it will come.
So basically you have to like log in with your email address and your passport.
Can we do it in this meeting?
So I'm not sure if you guys met, but Erik, this is Taabish.
He's our Webflow developer on the team.
can kind of help out with how he typically, usually I just send content to him, and he'll help So he can kind of walk you through how that works.
I've just shared an invitation to Erik.
Yeah, it's small case, uppercase, number, symbol, everything, like...
Small letter, upper letter, number, symbol.
Yeah, I've tried to use one pass to set it up.
Is it because the password is not correct?
No, this is the first time you are registering that.
Does it need a special character?
Yeah, let me just fix this real quick.
Okay, I click add question mark added in the UI.
Okay, you are in the admin panel.
Okay, so in the bottom of the screen, you can see there is various types of buttons, pages, collection, and forms.
So here you can see all the 455 pages of the entire website, home pricing, everything.
Okay, now click on the second tab, collections.
So in this tab, you will find all the backend related stuff like blogs, case study, reviews, categories, legal pages, everything, all the backend stuff like the CMS page, you will find in this panel.
Click on a blog, the third one, the fourth one.
Yes, so you will find all the blogs, which is on the website.
You can search it, can filter it, you can export it, everything.
Click on any of the blog.
Okay, now you can make any of the changes on the blog, like the name, the host body, the category, the URL, everything.
The only thing you need to remember is like whenever you do any kind of changes anywhere, you just need to click on the publish button on the top right, the blue button.
Once you make any changes on the blog, like even if you add one dot, the blue button will become active.
Okay, okay, now click on back to live site.
Now again, click on edit site at the bottom right.
So you can also directly change the text on the website.
Let's just hold on any text on the heading.
You can see the small pencil icon.
Let's click on that and you can change the text directly on the line.
Like if you want to change anything, like on any pages everywhere, also with the buttons, like if you want to change any kind of button links, you just click on the any button.
Like there is a setting I can.
Like you can change the image, like clicking on the image.
You understood, Form data is basically, that is directly connected with the HubSpot.
So there will be no form response in the port tab.
Like you can't find any form response in the admin panel.
The data is directly hitting the HubSpot, not on the Webflow.
you can't find anything on the flow.
So that's it, like, you have seen the static pages, the CMS pages, how to publish, and everything.
Let's just add customer credit on any of the pages, and you can just enter the editing panel.
The blue button is now active.
So now your changes will be go live directly on domain.
I don't want to make any changes.
And then, Amulya, is there any specific categories that you want us to use?
Um, just whatever makes sense to you guys.
Um, you know, for a lot of it is.
Dependent on Persona, so like to imagine, content marketing would be like, obviously like, content-focused blogs.
And then don't do the HockeyStack users one, because I think that we typically do for like, specific product-related updates.
And then for like the, for example, for the HockeyStack risk caliber mind one, we'd typically do like, industry.
Or, you know, something like that, so that it's like, kind of an industry overview type vibe.
I can, I can always, yeah, like once you put it into the system, I can always double check.
Or if you're, if I'm like, when I'm reading the blogs that you've written, if you can put the category, the proposed category there, I can look at that as well.
Yeah, typically the product blog is for product releases as well, so I wouldn't use that one, but yeah.
You can also add new categories, like, but leave that plus icon on the right.
I want to create a new type of categories, okay?
Anything else we need to know?
No, I covered everything, like static pages, CMS pages, how to publish, and everything.
Amulya, anything else you want us to be aware of as we're getting ready to publish this week?
No, think I owe you an introduction to our designer, so I'll do that shortly.
Sorry, Shadi's been a really crazy day, but I will intro you guys to John on our team just after this call.
I know, like, I'll review the Calibramind blog and a couple other assets that you've shared in the channel as well.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of HockeyStack's Webflow-based website editing process for GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Webflow admin access via "?edit" URL param; simple UI for content updates](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [CMS structure: static pages, collections (blogs, case studies, etc.), direct text edits](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Publishing process: make changes, click "Publish" (blue button) to go live](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Blog categories flexible; avoid "HockeyStack users" for product updates](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

## Topics

### Webflow Admin Access

  - [Access admin panel: add "?edit" to URL end](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Login bar appears at bottom of screen](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Sections: Pages (static), Collections (CMS), Forms](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Content Management

  - [Pages tab: 455 total site pages (home, pricing, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Collections: backend CMS (blogs, case studies, reviews, categories)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Blog editing: modify title, body, category, URL directly](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Static page edits: click pencil icon on text/images for inline changes](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)

### Publishing Process

  - [Any content change activates blue "Publish" button](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Click "Publish" to push changes live on domain](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Forms data bypasses Webflow, connects directly to HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Blog Categories

  - [Flexible category creation (e.g., content marketing, industry overviews)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Avoid "HockeyStack users" category (reserved for product updates)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [New categories can be added via "+" icon](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Erik to start using Webflow for content updates](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Amulya to review Calibramind blog and other shared assets](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Amulya to introduce GrowthX team to John (HockeyStack designer)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Team to use appropriate blog categories, proposing new ones as needed](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

action_items.description: Set up Webflow account using invitation email, log in with question mark edit URL
Propose categories for new blog posts when submitting content to Amulya
Introduce Erik to John (designer) on the team
Review Calibramind blog and other assets shared in channel
